title: Executive Order 5456—Power-Site Restoration No. 449, Blacksmith Fork, Utah
text:
So much of the order of July 26, 1913, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 393, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
SALT LAKE MERIDIAN
T. 10 N., R. 1 E., sec. 12, NE. ¼ of SE. ¼.
T. 10 N., R. 2 E., sec. 1, N. ½ of SW. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
October 1, 1930.
